title: Secure, Performant, and Maintainable Python Delivery · Program Defense
summary: Deliver a trustworthy local automation product for a community program with operator and learner documentation. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a production-shaped local automation capstone. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Turn stakeholder stories into explicit inputs, outputs, invariants, failures, acceptance checks, and staged implementation work.
Treat files, arguments, environment values, paths, and subprocess data as untrusted boundaries with least authority.
Keep secrets out of source and logs while validating configuration presence, provenance, and safe defaults.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""python-basics cumulative stakeholder program."""

from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any
